glue.partition.CatalogId.Description: The AWS account ID of the catalog in which the partion is to be created.  To specify the account ID, you can use the `Ref` intrinsic function with the `AWS::AccountId` pseudo parameter. For example: `!Ref AWS::AccountId`

glue.partition.DatabaseName.Description: The name of the catalog database in which to create the partition.

glue.partition.PartitionInput.Description: The structure used to create and update a partition.

glue.partition.TableName.Description: The name of the metadata table in which the partition is to be created.
